text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meisho Doto clears ramp after ramp.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup, hm-hm-hmm. I'll turn over a
sparkly new leeeaf, useful to Opera O as I can
beee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh, but my time isn't getting any better. Even
with all my practice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the reason for that is clear—she lacks the will
to compete. It's more than obvious now that her
pining over T.M. Opera O will continue to hold us
back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto, do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Admire Vega a wink. When something
needs saying, it must be said.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, what do you think I should do? I'm
worried my running is falling behind Opera O's
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Of course it is. Do you know why?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's because dote on her too much, and now
you're focusing on the wrong opponent.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You'll... never get strong that way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ayabe... what do mean by opponent?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto. Who do you think you need to beat?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... Special Week and Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're wrong.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Who is it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to tell it to her straight—it's my
responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, um... do you know who... my opponent
is?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The wind comes to a halt.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera... O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... are you sure you're not mistaken? I mean...
I've won against her sometimes, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No, I think... it is. Opera O is my...
choice_data_list: She's a rival you must surpass.
She's a rival you must surpass.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She's not my rival. Opera O is my idol... she's my
inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You're wrong! You've gotten it wrong, all wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's rebuttals are filled with agony,
desperately guarding what's important to her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You and Opera O... You and Opera O are the
only ones on my side, and that will never change.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I've always... always admired Opera O... I've wanted to be just like her...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She was the one who told me how brightly I
shined. She gave me confidence...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: If that's how you got your confidence, Doto...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Then if Opera O was to disappear, it would
disappear right along with her. Are you fine with
that?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Your beloved Opera O—where do you think her
radiance comes from?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's all down to her astounding level of
confidence. Opera O will never bow down to
anyone over anything.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You won't become any more confident hiding
under the comfort of that proverbial umbrella.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That might have worked at the beginning. But
now... the seasons have changed.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You'll find yourself driven to a corner if you don't
change. Opera O's facing the same dilemma.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The generation before us is strong. You have to
put pressure on Opera O, view her as
competition, so that you can grow together.
Otherwise, you two have no chance.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Opera O said something similar in that
bygone summer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Our footsteps could leave a mark on history.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Or, we could fail to realize our dreams and sink to
rock bottom.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: However you want things to be... is up to you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It can't be... If... things don't change, I'll return...
back to how I was in the past.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
To prevent that... I have to see Opera O as an
adversary...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Nghh... I just can't. I'll do anything else...
anything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you know I can't bring myself to feel that way! You know iiit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to draw out Meisho Doto's true feelings,
step by step, with attention and care.
choice_data_list:
You don't want to go back to your past self,
right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... Well, that's...
choice_data_list: You want to shine, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh, I dooo... B-but...
choice_data_list:
And you'll be repaying your debts to T.M.
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Repaying my... debts? Will I?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...But! But!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her cowering beneath Opera O's shadow,
she's made steady progress to this point. Now's
the time for the last push.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure, Meisho Doto will likely never "awaken" on
her own. But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh? I haven't yet begun my growth spurt?
Ohhhh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll... do my best, step by step! It might be
hopeless in the end, but I can take things slow.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've got a lot of growing to do, and that includes
my heart... Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I want to do more things that will help
me grow.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... ohhh, how? My dash time isn't getting any
shorter.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: One last lap, please! I have to figure this out... I just have to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto, in all her moments of inexperience,
the countless times she's been backed into a
wall...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's never given up on herself. Not once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's why, even now...
choice_data_list: You're strong. You could never give up, right?
You're strong. You could never give up, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Sniff! Well, I... I... I!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I won't give up! I don't want to lose—even to Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finally see Doto's desire to win break through
her inferiority complex.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be a late bloomer, but that's okay. As
long as she's got her roots in the ground, she'll
keep on growing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I'll... tell her. I'll declare her my rival.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm scared that... this will change our relationship.
But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it! I'll challenge Opera O! I... I have to
change... for her sake as much as my own!
